concept.description: The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image
The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image
The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image

prompt_blueprint.template:
Summarize the content of this page concisely:

@page

document_batch.combine_summaries.description: Combine all page summaries into document summary

url.description: The document URL: pipelex storage URL, HTTP/HTTPS URL, or base64 data URL
url.title: Url

public_url.description: The public HTTPS URL of the document
public_url.title: Public Url

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the document
mime_type.title: Mime Type

filename.description: The original filename of the document
filename.title: Filename

title.description: The title of the document or source
title.title: Title

snippet.description: A text snippet or excerpt from the document
snippet.title: Snippet

native.Page.description: The content of a page of a document, comprising text and linked images and an optional page view image

url.description: The image URL: pipelex storage URL, HTTP/HTTPS URL, or base64 data URL
url.title: Url

public_url.description: The public URL of the image
public_url.title: Public Url

source_prompt.description: The source prompt of the image
source_prompt.title: Source Prompt

source_negative_prompt.description: The source negative prompt of the image
source_negative_prompt.title: Source Negative Prompt

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the image
mime_type.title: Mime Type

size.description: The size in pixels (width and height) of the image

filename.description: The original filename of the image
filename.title: Filename

images.description: A list of images that were extracted from the text
images.title: Images

raw_html.description: The raw HTML of the fetched page, if requested
raw_html.title: Raw Html

text_and_images.description: The text and images content extracted from the page
